description:
Analyze the TCP capture file '200722_tcp_anon.pcapng' in ~/Documents/captures/ using Wireshark. Generate a report at '~/Documents/captures/tcp_connection_state_report.txt' containing exactly these seven metrics (one per line, format 'key: value'):
total_tcp_streams: Total number of unique TCP conversations.
syn_packets: Count of initial connection attempt packets (SYN flag set, ACK flag NOT set).
streams_with_rst: Number of unique streams containing at least one RST packet.
streams_with_fin: Number of unique streams containing at least one FIN packet.
unanswered_syn_streams: Number of unique streams that have a SYN packet but no corresponding SYN-ACK
